title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Droom

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Droom
jsonLd.description:
Droom invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom:
Droom is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom!
